positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a glowing crescent moon embracing a cluster of floating, bioluminescent flora and celestial origami birds. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, featuring a strong contrast between deep indigo space and vibrant neon teal and gold highlights. The style should be elegant, sophisticated flat vector art mixed with subtle cosmic watercolor textures, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. High detail in flora shapes, clean lines, strong silhouette for print clarity, cosmic dust motes visible. Studio shot, centralized design.
